options.title: Locate the Shared Space Screen and turn it on

steps.instruction: The TV looks something like this:
steps.alt: Picture showing where the main room TV is

steps.instruction: On this next screen, let's pull up our INPUT options. Click on the menu button here and go to INPUTS
steps.alt: Picture showing TV on and the menu button

steps.instruction: Here, we want to switch the input to the onboard computer. Click PC and select HDMI1
steps.alt: Picture showing Inputs screen and where to click

steps.instruction: A window similar to this should come up. Now let's make sure the computer is on.
steps.alt: Picture showing PC Input window open

steps.instruction: Voila! The scrim should now begin coming down in the Auditorium.
steps.alt: Video showing the scrim coming down

steps.instruction: Now to control the computer connected, you must find the Auditorium Keyboard.
Typically, the keyboard floats around the kitchen area of the second floor. Look for it somewhere in the following area.
